# Release Checklist: <title>

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant tests pass.
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed if needed.
- [ ] README updated.
- [ ] Context files updated.
- [ ] Generated files reviewed.

## Runtime Requirements

- [ ] Python version documented.
- [ ] External tools documented.
- [ ] Environment variables documented.

## Safety

- [ ] Filesystem paths touched by the script are documented.
- [ ] Destructive behavior requires explicit opt-in.
- [ ] Logs and reports are documented.
- [ ] Recovery or rollback notes are documented where relevant.

## Release Notes

<User-facing summary of what changed.>
